description_long: This is a decorative swing bench suspended by two black ropes, featuring a pastel purple color with dark purple heart and geometric motifs on both the seat and the backrest. The seat consists of two wooden planks, each adorned with intricate line patterns and a large heart at the center. The backrest is a single plank with a matching heart motif and geometric accents, providing support for the user. The ropes are attached through metal eyelets at the corners of the seat and backrest, ensuring stability and secure suspension. The bench lacks armrests and has no visible legs, relying entirely on the ropes for support. Its playful design and color scheme suggest it is intended for parks, playgrounds, or whimsical urban outdoor spaces.
description: A pastel purple swing bench with heart and geometric motifs, suspended by black ropes and featuring a backrest. The seat and backrest are decorated with dark purple patterns, making it suitable for playful outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-plank seat, the backrest, and the black suspension ropes; heart motif is visible on the seat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the seat and backrest, both with heart and geometric designs, and the attachment points of the ropes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the seat planks, backrest, and rope attachments.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the backrest, the supporting ropes, and the underside of the seat.
attribute_leg_design: no visible legs, suspended by ropes
